name: nika
description: Nika · the workflow language for AI. Author AI workflows as checkable .nika.yaml files.

plugins.name: nika
plugins.description: Author AI workflows as checkable .nika.yaml files. Bundles the nika-authoring skill, the nika-author subagent, the language rule, three commands, a check-on-edit hook and the read-only Nika MCP oracle (8 tools). Requires the nika binary: brew install supernovae-st/tap/nika
